attempt.context: Plan/summary docs migration to XML templates.
attempt.analysis: Templates were missing ReferencesBlock for PRD/GRD, added to atoms/molecules/organisms.
attempt.fix: Updated doc-template XML to include ReferenceAtom + ReferencesBlock.

attempt.analysis: XML planning docs are now primary; markdown is consolidated into REFERENCES.xml.
attempt.fix: Added `scripts/planning-md-to-xml.mjs` and ran it for initial migration.

attempt.context: Local cleanup of temporary release-artifact smoke directory.
attempt.error: Cleanup command rejected by command policy for recursive delete.
attempt.analysis: Validation artifacts were generated successfully, but automated deletion was blocked in the current tool policy.
attempt.fix: Left generated temp artifacts in `.planning/test-reports/tmp-release` and continued with non-destructive verification reporting.
